title: Add employees to policy
description: Select the employees you want to add to this policy.
holidayDescription: Select the employees you want to add to this holiday pay policy.
reassignmentWarning: Any employees currently assigned to another {{policyType}} policy will be moved to this policy.

errors.removeEmployeesFailed: Unable to remove employees from this policy. {{details}}

removeConfirmDialog.description_one: This employee's balance for this policy will be removed. They can be re-added later.
removeConfirmDialog.description_other: These employees' balances for this policy will be removed. They can be re-added later.

addConfirmDialog.description_one: This employee will be added to the policy with the specified starting balance.
addConfirmDialog.description_other: These employees will be added to the policy with the specified starting balances.
